name: New... Survivor?...
description:
Requested!

YOU, yes YOU were a killer! ... except you weren't, you were so, so very bad at your job of killing, the Spectre decided to make you a survivor instead. Awkward...

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Slasher, John Doe, Mafioso, Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, Noli.
